assertions.description: INCORRECT: The schematic uses a local label 'Vout' to connect U1's OUTPUT pin (Hall sensor digital output) to J1 pin 2 and C1. It is a signal net, not a power rail. The analyzer includes it in statistics.power_rails alongside '+3V3' and 'GNDREF', which is wrong. Only nets driven by power symbols or PWR_FLAG should appear in power_rails.
